best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the only consistently profitable bucket; enforce hard ceiling at RSI 60; n=2 (directionally clean, sample small)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — all overbought chase entries have lost; hard ceiling, no exceptions
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap pattern; skip entirely; 5th+ consecutive instance of this failure mode in 2026-06-25 session
Gap-up opens with RSI >65: Zero qualifications in all sessions; any name opening RSI >65 is a hard skip regardless of structural setup quality
overnight_hold_insights: Zero overnight carries across all 21 sessions. The six-criteria gate (profitable + trailing-stop-active + above EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion) has never been met simultaneously. Extended/thin candidate pool prevents qualified entries, let alone overnight candidates. Policy is sound — no change warranted.

notes_for_next_session:
FOR EVENING SCAN / PREMARKET AGENT (2026-06-25 evening / 2026-06-26 premarket).

BOOK STATE: Flat. 17th consecutive no-entry session. Equity $99,938.80.

KEY PATTERNS FROM TODAY:
  - Gap-up trap repeated for 5th+ consecutive session across all names: ES, MGM, AMD, PANW all opened RSI 67-83, reversed to 36-54 by midday.
  - ES: deprioritize going forward. ATR% consistently 0.095-0.105 (far below 0.30 floor), rel_vol 0.27-0.45 (below 1.3 floor). Not a tradeable setup in any regime.
  - AMD: dangerously volatile (RSI swings from 89 premarket to 36 by midday). Watch-only. Do not enter unless RSI is cleanly in 55-60 zone at open AND all other criteria met.
  - MGM: still the strongest structural candidate (VCP 0.598, vol dry 0.469, RS 1.149). But RSI 54 at midday today. If overnight session brings RSI back to 55-60 range WITHOUT a gap-up, this is the most likely entry candidate tomorrow.
  - PANW: RS strong (1.175) but keeps gap-up trapping. Watch only if RSI cleanly enters 55-60 zone at open with no gap.

GUIDELINES FOR TOMORROW OPEN:
  1. Hard skip any name with RSI > 60 at open — no exceptions, even if structurally perfect.
  2. Verify rel_vol >= 1.3 AND ATR% >= 0.30 before any entry (ES keeps failing both).
  3. DOWN regime cap = 5 positions (likely still DOWN unless SPY shows clear EMA-9 > EMA-21 crossover).
  4. If MGM RSI is 55-60 at open with rel_vol >= 1.3 and price near or above prev_day_high — this is the highest-conviction potential entry in the current pool.
  5. SPY data was unavailable today (TLS/yfinance error) — refresh SPY regime status in premarket agent.

EVENING SCAN: Focus on whether any new names enter the universe with RSI in 55-60 range and tight VCP (ratio < 0.70). The current 4-name watchlist has been recycled for 2+ sessions; fresh candidates with better setups would be valuable.
